top_stories.title: Alibaba Qwen Team Releases Qwen3.5-397B MoE Model with 17B Active Parameters and 1M Token Context for AI agents
top_stories.description: Alibaba Cloud just updated the open-source landscape. Today, the Qwen team released Qwen3.5, the newest generation of their large language model (LLM) family. The most powerful version is Qwen3.5-397B-A17B. This model is a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) system. It combines massive reasoning power with high efficiency. Qwen3.5 is a native vision-language model. It is designed specifically […] The post Alibaba Qwen Team Releases Qwen3.5-397B MoE Model with 17B Active Parameters and 1M Token...

top_stories.title: Customize AI agent browsing with proxies, profiles, and extensions in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Browser
top_stories.description: Today, we are announcing three new capabilities that address these requirements: proxy configuration, browser profiles, and browser extensions. Together, these features give you fine-grained control over how your AI agents interact with the web. This post will walk through each capability with configuration examples and practical use cases to help you get started.
top_stories.author: Joshua Samuel
top_stories.content: Today, we are announcing three new capabilities that address these requirements: proxy configuration, browser profiles, and browser extensions. Together, these features give you fine-grained control over how your AI agents interact with the web. This post will walk through each capability with configuration examples and practical use cases to help you get started.

top_stories.title: Google AI Introduces the WebMCP to Enable Direct and Structured Website Interactions for New AI Agents
top_stories.description: Google is officially turning Chrome into a playground for AI agents. For years, AI ‘browsers’ have relied on a messy process: taking screenshots of websites, running them through vision models, and guessing where to click. This method is slow, breaks easily, and consumes massive amounts of compute. Google has introduced a better way: the Web […] The post Google AI Introduces the WebMCP to Enable Direct and Structured Website Interactions for New AI Agents appeared first on MarkTechPost.

top_stories.title: Unpacking the craft of  an  applied machine learning product manager
top_stories.description: Great ML models don’t guarantee great products. Applied ML PMs turn model performance into experiences users can trust, understand, and value.
top_stories.author: Sanjana Arun
top_stories.content: Great ML models don’t guarantee great products. Applied ML PMs turn model performance into experiences users can trust, understand, and value.

top_stories.title: How academic collaboration delivers real-world security to Amazon customers
top_stories.description: An early meeting between Amazon scientists and Stanford researchers led to cvc5, an open-source tool now powering approximately one billion automated-reasoning checks across AWS every day.
top_stories.author: Staff writer
top_stories.content: An early meeting between Amazon scientists and Stanford researchers led to cvc5, an open-source tool now powering approximately one billion automated-reasoning checks across AWS every day.
